zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur於1459年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯時，他的父親William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth33歲，母親Katherine Lenthall45歲。他於1469年與Joan Dinham在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1526年3月23日在英國薩默塞特卡素 加里享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur于1459年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯时，他的父亲William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth33岁，母亲Katherine Lenthall45岁。他于1469年与Joan Dinham在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1526年3月23日在英国薩默塞特卡素 加里享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur was born in 1459, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth, was 33 and his mother, Katherine Lenthall, was 45. He married Joan Dinham in 1469, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 23 March 1526, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur est né en 1459, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Katherine Lenthall, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Joan Dinham en 1469, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 23 mars 1526, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur 1459 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth 33 und seine Mutter Katherine Lenthall 45. Er hat 1469 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England Joan Dinham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 23. März 1526 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Castle Cary, Somerset, England und wurde in Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur è nato il nel 1459 nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Lenthall, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Joan Dinham nel 1469, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 23 marzo 1526, nel Castle Cary, Somerset, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maurが1459年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで生まれた時，父William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworthは33歳，母Katherine Lenthallは45歳であった。1469年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスでJoan Dinhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1526年3月23日にイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur(이)가 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Lenthall(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1469년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 Joan Dinham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1526년 3월 23일 영국 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur nasceu em 1459, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Lenthall, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Dinham em 1469, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de março de 1526, em Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur родился в 1459 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Lenthall, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Dinham в 1469 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 23 марта 1526 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur nació en 1459, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Katherine Lenthall, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Joan Dinham en 1469, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1526, en Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
